#Plasma cell representation
We notices some differences in the plasma cell composition between nerves, so we wanted to further investigate that. 
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(SpatialExperiment)
library(tidyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(purrr)
library(grid)
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size=14))
c25 <- c(
  "dodgerblue2", "#E31A1C", # red
"green4",
"#6A3D9A", # purple
"#FF7F00", # orange
"black", "gold1",
"skyblue2", "#FB9A99", # lt pink
"palegreen2",
"#CAB2D6", # lt purple
"#FDBF6F", # lt orange
"gray70", "khaki2",
"maroon", "orchid1", "deeppink1", "blue1", "steelblue4",
"darkturquoise", "green1", "yellow4", "yellow3",
"darkorange4", "brown"
)

spe <- readRDS("../data/SPE/Integrated_NMF.rds")
colData(spe) <- DataFrame(read.csv("../data/coldata/DE_SPE_annotaion.csv"))
colnames(spe) <- spe$barcode

W_df<- readRDS("../data/Deconvolution/RCTD_weights.Rds")

```

```{r}
plasma_cells <- data.frame(Status = ifelse(W_nerve$'B_cells_(Plasma cells)' >
                                             mean(W_nerve$'B_cells_(Plasma cells)',  na.rm = TRUE), "Plasma_High", "Plasma_Low"), row.names = row.names(W_nerve))

plasma_map <- setNames(plasma_cells$Status, row.names(plasma_cells))
spe$plasma <- recode(spe$barcode, !!!plasma_map, .default = NA_character_)

spe$plasma <- paste(spe$Invaded, spe$plasma, sep = "_")
```


```{r}
p <- ggcells(spe, aes(x=array_col, y=-array_row, color = plasma)) +
  geom_point(size=0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~sample_id,
             labeller = as_labeller(c(
               "70865bl15_highPNI" = "Patient 3 - Diseased",
               "6249bl18_noPNIandhighPNI" = "Patient 2 - Diseased",
               "70865bl5_noPNI" = "Patient 3 - Adjacent",
               "54703bl38_noPNI" = "Patient 1 - Adjacent",
               "54703bl28_highPNI" = "Patient 1 - Diseased",
               "6249bl23_noPNI" = "Patient 2 - Adjacent"
             ))) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Type",
    values = c(c25[18], c25[1], "grey90", c25[2], c25[5]), labels = c(
    "NA_NA" = "Other",
    "NonInvaded_Plasma_Low" = "Non-invaded - Plasma Low",
    "NonInvaded_Plasma_High" = "Non-invaded - Plasma High",
    "Invaded_Plasma_High" = "Invaded - Plasma High",
    "Invaded_Plasma_Low" = "Invaded - Plasma Low"
  )) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position ="right")
ggsave("../figures/plasma_cells_spatial.pdf", p, width = 18, height = 12)
p
```

```{r}
df_spots <- as.data.frame(colData(spe)) %>%
  mutate(
    barcode = colnames(spe),
    x = array_col,
    y = -array_row
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    W_df %>% transmute(barcode, plasma_weight_rctd = `B_cells(Plasma cells)`),
    by = "barcode"
  )

stopifnot("plasma_weight_rctd" %in% names(df_spots))
summary(df_spots$plasma_weight_rctd)
```

```{r}
# =========================
# Plasma weight + nerve hulls (control panel)
# =========================

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# ---- CONTROL PANEL ----
plot_cfg <- list(
  # IMPORTANT: must match df_spots$sample_label values (yours are P1-Adjacent etc.)
  sample_order = c(
    "P1-Adjacent",
    "P2-Adjacent",
    "P3-Adjacent",
    "P1-Diseased",
    "P2-Diseased",
    "P3-Diseased"
  ),

  # points
  point_size = 0.4,

  # hull styling
  halo_color = "white",
  halo_lwd   = 0.3,
  hull_lwd   = 0.7,
  hull_color_invaded    = "#E31A1C",
  hull_color_noninvaded = "skyblue2",

  # plasma scaling
  use_clipping = TRUE,
  clip_q = c(0.01, 0.99),
  viridis_option = "A",
  na_color = "grey85",

  coord_fixed = TRUE
)

# ---- BUILD df_spots (NO CHANGES TO spe) ----
df_spots <- as.data.frame(colData(spe)) %>%
  mutate(
    barcode = colnames(spe),
    x = array_col,
    y = -array_row
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    W_df %>% transmute(barcode, plasma_weight_rctd = `B_cells(Plasma cells)`),
    by = "barcode"
  )

# sanity: make sure we have values
stopifnot("plasma_weight_rctd" %in% names(df_spots))

# ---- helper: convex hull per nerve per sample ----
make_hulls <- function(dat) {
  dat %>%
    group_by(sample_label, NerveID) %>%
    filter(n() >= 3) %>%
    slice(chull(x, y)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(group_id = interaction(sample_label, NerveID, drop = TRUE))
}

# ---- plot function obeying control panel ----
plot_plasma_hulls <- function(df_spots, cfg) {
  df <- df_spots

  # SAFE sample ordering: keep any samples not listed (append to end)
  present <- unique(df$sample_label)
  extra <- setdiff(present, cfg$sample_order)
  df$sample_label <- factor(df$sample_label, levels = c(cfg$sample_order, extra))

  # plasma scaling (optional clipping)
  if (isTRUE(cfg$use_clipping)) {
    q <- quantile(df$plasma_weight_rctd, probs = cfg$clip_q, na.rm = TRUE)
    df$plasma_for_plot <- pmin(pmax(df$plasma_weight_rctd, q[1]), q[2])
  } else {
    df$plasma_for_plot <- df$plasma_weight_rctd
  }

  # nerve spots only for hulls
  df_nerve <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(NerveID), !is.na(sample_label), !is.na(InvadedNerve), !is.na(x), !is.na(y))

  hulls_inv <- df_nerve %>%
    filter(InvadedNerve %in% TRUE) %>%
    make_hulls()

  hulls_non <- df_nerve %>%
    filter(InvadedNerve %in% FALSE) %>%
    make_hulls()
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = x, y = y)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = plasma_for_plot), size = cfg$point_size) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(
      name = "Plasma cell weight (RCTD)",
      option = cfg$viridis_option,
      na.value = cfg$na_color
    ) +

    # ---- halo (no legend) ----
    geom_polygon(
      data = hulls_non,
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      aes(x = x, y = y, group = group_id),
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = cfg$halo_lwd,
      color = cfg$halo_color
    ) +
    geom_polygon(
      data = hulls_inv,
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      aes(x = x, y = y, group = group_id),
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = cfg$halo_lwd,
      color = cfg$halo_color
    ) +

    # ---- outlines WITH legend via linetype ----
    geom_polygon(
      data = hulls_non,
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      aes(x = x, y = y, group = group_id, linetype = "Uninvaded"),
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = cfg$hull_lwd,
      color = cfg$hull_color_noninvaded
    ) +
    geom_polygon(
      data = hulls_inv,
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      aes(x = x, y = y, group = group_id, linetype = "Invaded"),
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = cfg$hull_lwd,
      color = cfg$hull_color_invaded
    ) +

    scale_linetype_manual(
      name = "Nerve border",
      values = c(
        "Uninvaded" = "solid",
        "Invaded" = "solid"
      )
    ) +

    facet_wrap(~sample_label, drop = FALSE) +
    theme_void()
  
}

# ---- run ----
p <- plot_plasma_hulls(df_spots, plot_cfg)
p



```


```{r}
ggsave("../figures/plasma_weight_rctd_spatial_with_nerve_borders.pdf", p, width = 15, height = 10, dpi= 1200)
```
